scripts.build: npm run build -w @pdffill/core && npm run build -w pdffill
scripts.example:scaffold: node packages/cli/dist/index.js scaffold examples/complex/template-complex.pdf -o examples/complex/data.json --fields-output examples/complex/fields.json --with-mapping --business-output examples/complex/data.business.json --mapping-output examples/complex/mapping.json --schema-output examples/complex/schema.json
scripts.example:pipeline: npm run example:complex && npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run examples/complex/template-complex.pdf examples/complex/data.json -o examples/complex/filled.pdf
scripts.example:run-business: node packages/cli/dist/index.js run examples/complex/template-complex.pdf examples/complex/data.business.json -o examples/complex/filled-business.pdf --mapping examples/complex/mapping.json
scripts.example:diff: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js diff examples/complex/template-complex.pdf examples/complex/data.json --config examples/complex/pdffill.json
scripts.example:run-diff: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run examples/complex/template-complex.pdf examples/complex/data.json -o examples/complex/filled.pdf --config examples/complex/pdffill.json --diff
scripts.example:batch-jsonl: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js batch examples/complex/template-complex.pdf examples/complex/rows.json -o examples/complex/out --manifest examples/complex/manifest.jsonl --manifest-format jsonl --config examples/complex/pdffill.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @pdffill/core && npm run typecheck -w pdffill
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && npm pack -w @pdffill/core --dry-run && npm pack -w pdffill --dry-run
scripts.publish:core: npm run build -w @pdffill/core && npm publish -w @pdffill/core --access public
scripts.publish:cli: npm run build -w pdffill && npm publish -w pdffill --access public
